name: detector contract: each finding includes messageId and data fields
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/no-any.sh" --json --paths "src/**/*.ts" | node -e 'let s="";process.stdin.on("data",d=>s+=d);process.stdin.on("end",()=>{const r=JSON.parse(s);const f=(r.findings||[])[0];if(f&&typeof f.messageId==="string"&&typeof f.data==="object"){process.stderr.write("ok\n")}else{process.stderr.write("FAIL: missing messageId/data on finding\n");process.exit(1)}});'
setup: mkdir -p src && echo "const x: any = 1;" > src/a.ts
